claim: Citrea has announced a TGE for a native Citrea token.
judge_standard: Return FACT only if an official Citrea source confirms a native Citrea token TGE. Return CAP if official Citrea sources say there is no Citrea token. Return UNCLEAR if the sources are unofficial, stale, or indirect.

claim: Has Monad announced an airdrop snapshot?
judge_standard: Return FACT only if official Monad sources confirm an airdrop snapshot. Return CAP if official Monad sources contradict it. Return UNCLEAR if evidence is rumor-based or unofficial.

claim: MegaETH has published an official token page.
judge_standard: Return FACT only if official MegaETH sources confirm the token page. Return CAP if official sources contradict it. Return UNCLEAR if evidence is indirect.

claim: Berachain docs include BERA staking information.
judge_standard: Return FACT only if official Berachain docs confirm BERA staking information. Return CAP if official sources contradict it. Return UNCLEAR if evidence is incomplete.
Return FACT only if official Initia docs confirm INIT tokenomics. Return CAP if official sources contradict it. Return UNCLEAR if evidence is incomplete.
